properties.name: Community Recreation Center Parking Lot
properties.desc:
Free parking during Central Park's open hours.

This is a great parking lot for Raid Days & Raid Hours as it is close to the Community Recreation Center meetup spot where our guided Raid groups start.

properties.name: Santa Clara Sports Center Parking Lot
properties.desc:
Free parking during Central Park's open hours.

This is a great parking lot for Max Battle events as it is close to the Santa Clara Tennis Center meetup spot where our guided Max Battle groups start.

properties.name: Central Park Library Garage
properties.desc:
Free parking during the following times:

Mon: 9:45am–6:15pm
Tue–Thu: 9:45am–7:15pm
Fri: 9:45am–6:15pm
Sat: 9:45am–5:15pm
Sun: 12:45am–5:15pm

Closed Holidays

properties.name: Homestead Road Street Parking A
properties.desc:
Free street parking.

Vehicles over 20 feet in length are not allowed to park here.

Please note that a small portion of the west end of this block does not allow parking at any time.
